description: SearchService class wrapping a query that should be a named scope or model class method
input:
class PostSearchService
  def initialize(query, filters = {})
    @query = query
    @filters = filters
  end

  def results
    scope = Post.all
    scope = scope.where('title ILIKE ?', "%#{@query}%") if @query.present?
    scope = scope.where(category: @filters[:category]) if @filters[:category]
    scope = scope.where(published: true)
    scope.order(created_at: :desc)
  end
end
